mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reply (post_id, user_id, parent_id, body) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{body})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id AS postId, r.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, r.parent_id AS parentId, r.body, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_reply r JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.dayDate, '%m-%d') AS dateLabel, t.totalCount AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS dayDate, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM forum_reply WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) t ORDER BY t.dayDate
